system.effect: First tier of the Silver Tongue path. When making a Fascinate roll to command the attention of a crowd, you may ignore up to -1d of penalties caused by hostile or noisy environments.

Second tier. If your Fascinate roll fails to produce a set, you may immediately roll 1d10 and add it to the results, potentially forming a set. You must already know Captivating Gaze (Example) to learn this.
